item.title: 数据与行业智能平台
item.summary: 把数据、行业知识和 AI 工作流结合为持续运营能力的范式。

updates.event: ITU-T SG21本次全会参加方来自中国、美国、德国、日本、韩国、巴西、瑞士、加拿大、英国等国及国际组织，百余名代表参会。
updates.after: "中国、美国、德国、日本、韩国、巴西、瑞士、加拿大、英国及国际组织，百余名代表"

evidence.source_quote: 来自中国、美国、德国、日本、韩国、巴西、瑞士、加拿大、英国等国家和国际组织的百余名代表参加了会议。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 来自中国、美国、德国、日本、韩国、巴西、瑞士、加拿大、英国等国家和国际组织的百余名代表参加了会议。

updates.event: 数据分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境。
updates.after: "本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台、合作伙伴环境"

evidence.source_quote: 广泛分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境中。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 广泛分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境中。

updates.event: 数据资源覆盖文本、图像、音频、视频、三维内容、网络遥测数据、业务交互数据以及人工智能训练和推理数据等多种模态。
updates.after: "文本、图像、音频、视频、三维内容、网络遥测数据、业务交互数据以及AI训练和推理数据"

evidence.source_quote: 文本、图像、音频、视频、三维内容、网络遥测数据、业务交互数据以及人工智能训练和推理数据广泛分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境中。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 文本、图像、音频、视频、三维内容、网络遥测数据、业务交互数据以及人工智能训练和推理数据广泛分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境中。

updates.event: 该标准重点解决分布式数据发现、连接、语义管理、服务编排和治理控制等共性技术架构问题。
updates.after: "分布式数据发现、连接、语义管理、服务编排和治理控制"

evidence.source_quote: 该标准将重点解决分布式数据发现、连接、语义管理、服务编排和治理控制等共性技术架构问题

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该标准将重点解决分布式数据发现、连接、语义管理、服务编排和治理控制等共性技术架构问题

updates.event: 该标准拟系统规定多媒体数据编织系统的总体定位、基本概念、参与角色、功能要求、参考框架、功能组件及关键业务流程。
updates.after: "总体定位、基本概念、参与角色、功能要求、参考框架、功能组件及关键业务流程"

evidence.source_quote: 该标准拟系统规定多媒体数据编织系统的总体定位、基本概念、参与角色、功能要求、参考框架、功能组件及关键业务流程。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该标准拟系统规定多媒体数据编织系统的总体定位、基本概念、参与角色、功能要求、参考框架、功能组件及关键业务流程。

updates.event: 同主题更新：In production at Brevian.ai, BatchDAG processes queries over 50,000+ meetings in under 60 seconds, with per-query costs of $0.02-$0.24 at published GPT-5.1 pricing.；The BatchDAG planner achieved a 98.8% valid-DAG rate across 300 planning…

evidence.source_quote: processes queries over 50,000+ meetings in under 60 seconds, with measured per-query costs of $0.02-$0.24 at published GPT-5.1 pricing.

evidence_cards.source_quote: The planner achieves 98.8% valid-DAG rate across 300 planning calls.
processes queries over 50,000+ meetings in under 60 seconds, with measured per-query costs of $0.02-$0.24 at published GPT-5.1 pricing.

updates.event: Baseline systems achieved a 46-60% transcript evidence rate on the same query set.

evidence.source_quote: 77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60% for baselines

evidence_cards.source_quote: 77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60% for baselines

updates.event: BatchDAG achieves a 77% transcript evidence rate for provenance, compared with 46-60% for baselines.

evidence.source_quote: superior provenance (77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60% for baselines)

evidence_cards.source_quote: superior provenance (77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60% for baselines)

updates.event: A ReAct agent baseline scored 3.09/5 on the 12 transcript-heavy queries (p<0.01).

evidence.source_quote: significantly outperforms a ReAct agent (3.09/5, p<0.01)

evidence_cards.source_quote: significantly outperforms a ReAct agent (3.09/5, p<0.01)

updates.event: Expert-designed pipeline baseline achieved a quality score of 3.25/5 on the same 12 transcript-heavy queries.

evidence.source_quote: achieves quality comparable to an expert-designed pipeline (3.25/5)

evidence_cards.source_quote: achieves quality comparable to an expert-designed pipeline (3.25/5)

metricSummary.selection_policy: 只展示可跨期比较、会影响经营或战略位置的主指标。

facts.subject: data_fabric_scope_components
facts.statement: 该标准拟系统规定多媒体数据编织系统的总体定位、基本概念、参与角色、功能要求、参考框架、功能组件及关键业务流程。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该标准拟系统规定多媒体数据编织系统的总体定位、基本概念、参与角色、功能要求、参考框架、功能组件及关键业务流程。

facts.subject: data_fabric_technical_focus
facts.statement: 该标准重点解决分布式数据发现、连接、语义管理、服务编排和治理控制等共性技术架构问题。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该标准将重点解决分布式数据发现、连接、语义管理、服务编排和治理控制等共性技术架构问题

facts.subject: per_agent_identity_adoption
facts.statement: Only 32% of surveyed enterprises give every agent its own scoped, managed identity.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Just 32% give every agent its own scoped, managed identity

facts.subject: incident_rate_by_credential_posture
facts.statement: Organizations with any credential sharing in the agent fleet had a 63.5% incident-or-near-miss rate (47 of 74), versus 40.9% (9 of 22) where every agent carries its own scoped identity.
facts.effective_period: Past 12 months from the June 2026 survey

evidence_cards.source_quote: Organizations with credential sharing anywhere in the fleet were hit — with an incident or a near-miss in the past twelve months — at 63.5% (47 of 74). Organizations where every agent carries its own scoped identity were hit at 40.9% (9 of 22).

facts.subject: primary_security_layer_provider_native_share
facts.statement: 82% of enterprises name a provider-native offering (OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Anthropic) as their single primary agent security layer, while dedicated agent-security specialists register in the low single digits.

evidence_cards.source_quote: when asked to name their single primary security layer, 82% name one of these provider-native offerings

facts.subject: runtime_enforcement_and_observation_adoption
facts.statement: About 47% of enterprises observe agent activity and 49% enforce scoped permissions at runtime, but only 30% isolate highest-risk agents in sandboxes.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Roughly half of enterprises observe agent activity (47%) or enforce scoped permissions at runtime (49%), but only 30% isolate their highest-risk agents

facts.subject: best_of_breed_vs_consolidation_intent
facts.statement: 36% of enterprises intend to keep best-of-breed standalone retrieval tools, compared with 21% who plan to consolidate onto a provider's native context stack

evidence_cards.source_quote: a plurality of enterprises (36%) say they intend to keep best-of-breed standalone tools rather than consolidate onto a provider’s native context stack — well ahead of the 21% who plan to consolidate

facts.subject: contractor_cost_share_of_revenue
facts.statement: Mercor pays roughly two-thirds of its revenue to expert contractors who perform model evaluation work.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该公司需要将约三分之二的收入支付给这些承包商

facts.subject: gross_margin_2024
facts.statement: Mercor's gross margin was approximately 27% in 2024.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Mercor去年毛利率约为27%

facts.subject: annualized_revenue_target_year_end
facts.statement: Mercor projects its annualized revenue run rate will reach $2.8 billion by the end of 2025.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 该公司预计今年年底年化收入将达到28亿美元（约合人民币190亿元）

facts.subject: agent_confident_wrong_failure_rate
facts.statement: 57% of enterprises reported that in the past six months their AI agents produced confident but wrong answers traced to missing or inconsistent business context
facts.effective_period: past six months as of Q2 2026

evidence_cards.source_quote: A majority of enterprises (57%) report that in the past six months their AI agents produced confident but wrong answers they traced to missing or inconsistent business context

facts.subject: governed_semantic_layer_adoption
facts.statement: 58% of enterprises either run a governed semantic layer in production (25%) or are piloting and building one (34%)

evidence_cards.source_quote: Well over half of enterprises (58%) either run a governed semantic layer in production (25%) or are piloting and building one (34%)

facts.subject: dag_topology_optimization_factor
facts.statement: Entity-aware batching in BatchDAG groups rows by logical entity before fan-out, reducing LLM calls by up to 47x.

evidence_cards.source_quote: A key optimization, entity-aware batching, groups rows by logical entity before fan-out, reducing LLM calls by up to 47x.

facts.subject: provenance_evidence_rate_baselines
facts.statement: Baseline systems achieved a 46-60% transcript evidence rate on the same query set.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60% for baselines

facts.subject: provenance_evidence_rate_batchdag
facts.statement: BatchDAG achieves a 77% transcript evidence rate for provenance, compared with 46-60% for baselines.

evidence_cards.source_quote: superior provenance (77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60% for baselines)

facts.subject: deeptune_acquisition
facts.statement: On July 9, 2025, Mercor announced the acquisition of Deeptune, a startup specializing in reinforcement learning environment design.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 7月9日，Mercor宣布收购专注于强化学习环境设计的初创公司Deeptune

facts.subject: multimedia_data_modalities
facts.statement: 数据资源覆盖文本、图像、音频、视频、三维内容、网络遥测数据、业务交互数据以及人工智能训练和推理数据等多种模态。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 文本、图像、音频、视频、三维内容、网络遥测数据、业务交互数据以及人工智能训练和推理数据广泛分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境中。

facts.subject: framework_factor_count
facts.statement: Snowflake's AI-ready data framework defines six measurable factors (6C): Clean, Contextual, Consumable, Current, Correlated, Compliant.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 我们将「AI 就绪」拆解为六个可衡量因素——6C：Clean（干净）、Contextual（具备上下文）、Consumable（可直接使用）、Current（保持最新）、Correlated（可追溯关联）、Compliant（合规）

facts.subject: workload_latency_vector_search
facts.statement: Vector search requires single-digit millisecond latency.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 向量搜索需要个位数毫秒级延迟

facts.subject: workload_latency_online_feature
facts.statement: Online feature queries require sub-millisecond latency.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 在线特征查询需要亚毫秒级延迟

facts.subject: workload_latency_agent_tool
facts.statement: Agent tool calls require sub-second response.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 智能体工具调用则需要亚秒级响应

facts.subject: data_distribution_environments
facts.statement: 数据分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 广泛分布于本地系统、云平台、边缘节点、内容平台和合作伙伴环境中。
